title: Creativ 25379 Explosion Box, Size 7 cm x 7 cm x 7.5 cm + 12 cm x 12 cm x 12 cm, Off-White
features: Consists of box with 12 fixed pockets
12 Loose decoration items in 8 different designs
Smaller box inside and satin ribbon
description: From the manufacturer Features Gift box in heavy cardboard, which upon opening 'explodes' in several layers of pockets and compartments. The included decoration items/frames are decorated with personalized messages, pictures, clippings, decoupage etc.
